title: My Reservations
subtitle: Your short-term stays and their status

countdown.label: Time left to pay:
countdown.expired: Time's up — the reservation expired and the dates were released

emptyDescription: When you book a short-term stay, it will appear here.

checkout.title: Book your stay
checkout.subtitle: Pick your dates and confirm the reservation
checkout.pickDates: Select dates to see the price.
checkout.loadError: Could not load this unit's availability
checkout.quoteError: Could not calculate the price for those dates

cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? The dates will become available again.
cancelRefundMessage: If you cancel now you'll get back {{ amount }} {{ currency }} ({{ pct }}%). The dates will become available again.
cancelNoRefundMessage: If you cancel now there will be no refund per the policy. The dates will become available again.

extend.title: Extend stay
extend.pickDate: Choose your new check-out date. You're charged per night; the check-out night is not counted.
extend.quoteError: Could not calculate the price for that extension
extend.success: The stay was extended. Review the new outstanding balance.
